mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member( username, grade_id, password, nickname, name, birthday, gender, email, phone, skin_type, personal_color ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{gradeId}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{name}, #{birthday}, #{gender}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{skinType}, #{personalColor} )
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET nickname = #{nickname}, name = #{name}, birthday = #{birthday}, gender = #{gender}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, skin_type = #{skinType}, personal_color = #{personalColor} WHERE username = #{username}
